        "originalContents": "import { type CollectionEntry, getCollection } from \"astro:content\";\nimport I18nKey from \"@i18n/i18nKey\";\nimport { i18n } from \"@i18n/translation\";\nimport { getCategoryUrl } from \"@utils/url-utils.ts\";\n\n// // Retrieve posts and sort them by publication date\nasync function getRawSortedPosts() {\n\tconst allBlogPosts = await getCollection(\"posts\", ({ data }) =\u003e {\n\t\treturn import.meta.env.PROD ? data.draft !== true : true;\n\t});\n\n\tconst sorted = allBlogPosts.sort((a, b) =\u003e {\n\t\tconst dateA = new Date(a.data.published);\n\t\tconst dateB = new Date(b.data.published);\n\t\treturn dateA \u003e dateB ? -1 : 1;\n\t});\n\treturn sorted;\n}",

        "originalContents": "\n\nexport async function getCategoryList(): Promise\u003cCategory[]\u003e {\n\tconst allBlogPosts = await getCollection\u003c\"posts\"\u003e(\"posts\", ({ data }) =\u003e {\n\t\treturn import.meta.env.PROD ? data.draft !== true : true;\n\t});\n\tconst count: { [key: string]: number } = {};\n\tallBlogPosts.forEach((post: { data: { category: string | null } }) =\u003e {\n\t\tif (!post.data.category) {\n\t\t\tconst ucKey = i18n(I18nKey.uncategorized);\n\t\t\tcount[ucKey] = count[ucKey] ? count[ucKey] + 1 : 1;\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tconst categoryName =\n\t\t\ttypeof post.data.category === \"string\"\n\t\t\t\t? post.data.category.trim()\n\t\t\t\t: String(post.data.category).trim();\n\n\t\tcount[categoryName] = count[categoryName] ? count[categoryName] + 1 : 1;\n\t});\n\n\tconst lst = Object.keys(count).sort((a, b) =\u003e {\n\t\treturn a.toLowerCase().localeCompare(b.toLowerCase());\n\t});\n\n\tconst ret: Category[] = [];\n\tfor (const c of lst) {\n\t\tret.push({\n\t\t\tname: c,\n\t\t\tcount: count[c],\n\t\t\turl: getCategoryUrl(c),\n\t\t});\n\t}\n\treturn ret;\n}",

        "originalContents": "\n\nexport async function GET(context: APIContext) {\n\tconst blog = await getSortedPosts();\n\n\treturn rss({\n\t\ttitle: siteConfig.title,\n\t\tdescription: siteConfig.subtitle || \"No description\",\n\t\tsite: context.site ?? \"https://fuwari.vercel.app\",\n\t\titems: blog.map((post) =\u003e {\n\t\t\tconst content =\n\t\t\t\ttypeof post.body === \"string\" ? post.body : String(post.body || \"\");\n\t\t\tconst cleanedContent = stripInvalidXmlChars(content);\n\t\t\treturn {\n\t\t\t\ttitle: post.data.title,\n\t\t\t\tpubDate: post.data.published,\n\t\t\t\tdescription: post.data.description || \"\",\n\t\t\t\tlink: url(&#96;/posts/${post.slug}/&#96;),\n\t\t\t\tcontent: sanitizeHtml(parser.render(cleanedContent), {\n\t\t\t\t\tallowedTags: sanitizeHtml.defaults.allowedTags.concat([\"img\"]),\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t};\n\t\t}),\n\t\tcustomData: &#96;\u003clanguage\u003e${siteConfig.lang}\u003c/language\u003e&#96;,\n\t});\n}",

            "lineNumber": 64

          },

            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "\tconst groupedPostsArray = Object.keys(grouped).map((yearStr) =\u003e ({"

        "originalContents": "\u003cscript lang=\"ts\"\u003e\nimport { onMount } from \"svelte\";\n\nimport I18nKey from \"../i18n/i18nKey\";\nimport { i18n } from \"../i18n/translation\";\nimport { getPostUrlBySlug } from \"../utils/url-utils\";\n\nexport let tags: string[];\nexport let categories: string[];\nexport let sortedPosts: Post[] = [];\n\nconst params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\ntags = params.has(\"tag\") ? params.getAll(\"tag\") : [];\ncategories = params.has(\"category\") ? params.getAll(\"category\") : [];\nconst uncategorized = params.get(\"uncategorized\");\n\ninterface Post {\n\tslug: string;\n\tdata: {\n\t\ttitle: string;\n\t\ttags: string[];\n\t\tcategory?: string;\n\t\tpublished: Date;\n\t};\n}\n\ninterface Group {\n\tyear: number;\n\tposts: Post[];\n}\n\nlet groups: Group[] = [];\n\nfunction formatDate(date: Date) {\n\tconst month = (date.getMonth() + 1).toString().padStart(2, \"0\");\n\tconst day = date.getDate().toString().padStart(2, \"0\");\n\treturn &#96;${month}-${day}&#96;;\n}\n\nfunction formatTag(tagList: string[]) {\n\treturn tagList.map((t) =\u003e &#96;#${t}&#96;).join(\" \");\n}\n\nonMount(async () =\u003e {\n\tlet filteredPosts: Post[] = sortedPosts;\n\n\tif (tags.length \u003e 0) {\n\t\tfilteredPosts = filteredPosts.filter(\n\t\t\t(post) =\u003e\n\t\t\t\tArray.isArray(post.data.tags) \u0026\u0026\n\t\t\t\tpost.data.tags.some((tag) =\u003e tags.includes(tag)),\n\t\t);\n\t}\n\n\tif (categories.length \u003e 0) {\n\t\tfilteredPosts = filteredPosts.filter(\n\t\t\t(post) =\u003e post.data.category \u0026\u0026 categories.includes(post.data.category),\n\t\t);\n\t}\n\n\tif (uncategorized) {\n\t\tfilteredPosts = filteredPosts.filter((post) =\u003e !post.data.category);\n\t}\n\n\tconst grouped = filteredPosts.reduce(\n\t\t(acc, post) =\u003e {\n\t\t\tconst year = post.data.published.getFullYear();\n\t\t\tif (!acc[year]) {\n\t\t\t\tacc[year] = [];\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tacc[year].push(post);\n\t\t\treturn acc;\n\t\t},\n\t\t{} as Record\u003cnumber, Post[]\u003e,\n\t);\n\n\tconst groupedPostsArray = Object.keys(grouped).map((yearStr) =\u003e ({\n\t\tyear: Number.parseInt(yearStr, 10),\n\t\tposts: grouped[Number.parseInt(yearStr, 10)],\n\t}));\n\n\tgroupedPostsArray.sort((a, b) =\u003e b.year - a.year);\n\n\tgroups = groupedPostsArray;\n});\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n",

        "originalContents": "---\nimport type { GetStaticPaths } from \"astro\";\nimport Pagination from \"../components/control/Pagination.astro\";\nimport PostPage from \"../components/PostPage.astro\";\nimport { PAGE_SIZE } from \"../constants/constants\";\nimport MainGridLayout from \"../layouts/MainGridLayout.astro\";\nimport { getSortedPosts } from \"../utils/content-utils\";\n\nexport const getStaticPaths = (async ({ paginate }) =\u003e {\n\tconst allBlogPosts = await getSortedPosts();\n\treturn paginate(allBlogPosts, { pageSize: PAGE_SIZE });\n}) satisfies GetStaticPaths;\n// https://github.com/withastro/astro/issues/6507#issuecomment-1489916992\n\nconst { page } = Astro.props;\n\nconst len = page.data.length;\n---\n\n\u003cMainGridLayout\u003e\n    \u003cPostPage page={page}\u003e\u003c/PostPage\u003e\n    \u003cPagination class=\"mx-auto onload-animation\" page={page} style={&#96;animation-delay: calc(var(--content-delay) + ${(len)*50}ms)&#96;}\u003e\u003c/Pagination\u003e\n\u003c/MainGridLayout\u003e",

        "originalContents": "---\nimport path from \"node:path\";\nimport License from \"@components/misc/License.astro\";\nimport Markdown from \"@components/misc/Markdown.astro\";\nimport I18nKey from \"@i18n/i18nKey\";\nimport { i18n } from \"@i18n/translation\";\nimport MainGridLayout from \"@layouts/MainGridLayout.astro\";\nimport { getSortedPosts } from \"@utils/content-utils\";\nimport { getDir, getPostUrlBySlug } from \"@utils/url-utils\";\nimport { Icon } from \"astro-icon/components\";\nimport { licenseConfig } from \"src/config\";\nimport ImageWrapper from \"../../components/misc/ImageWrapper.astro\";\nimport PostMetadata from \"../../components/PostMeta.astro\";\nimport { profileConfig, siteConfig } from \"../../config\";\nimport { formatDateToYYYYMMDD } from \"../../utils/date-utils\";\n\nexport async function getStaticPaths() {\n\tconst blogEntries = await getSortedPosts();\n\treturn blogEntries.map((entry) =\u003e ({\n\t\tparams: { slug: entry.slug },\n\t\tprops: { entry },\n\t}));\n}\n\nconst { entry } = Astro.props;\nconst { Content, headings } = await entry.render();\n\nconst { remarkPluginFrontmatter } = await entry.render();\n\nconst jsonLd = {\n\t\"@context\": \"https://schema.org\",\n\t\"@type\": \"BlogPosting\",\n\theadline: entry.data.title,\n\tdescription: entry.data.description || entry.data.title,\n\tkeywords: entry.data.tags,\n\tauthor: {\n\t\t\"@type\": \"Person\",\n\t\tname: profileConfig.name,\n\t\turl: Astro.site,\n\t},\n\tdatePublished: formatDateToYYYYMMDD(entry.data.published),\n\tinLanguage: entry.data.lang\n\t\t? entry.data.lang.replace(\"_\", \"-\")\n\t\t: siteConfig.lang.replace(\"_\", \"-\"),\n\t// TODO include cover image here\n};\n---\n",

        "originalContents": "---\nimport I18nKey from \"../../i18n/i18nKey\";\nimport { i18n } from \"../../i18n/translation\";\nimport { getCategoryList } from \"../../utils/content-utils\";\nimport ButtonLink from \"../control/ButtonLink.astro\";\nimport WidgetLayout from \"./WidgetLayout.astro\";\n\nconst categories = await getCategoryList();\n\nconst COLLAPSED_HEIGHT = \"7.5rem\";\nconst COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD = 5;\n\nconst isCollapsed = categories.length \u003e= COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD;\n\ninterface Props {\n\tclass?: string;\n\tstyle?: string;\n}\nconst className = Astro.props.class;\nconst style = Astro.props.style;\n---\n\n\u003cWidgetLayout name={i18n(I18nKey.categories)} id=\"categories\" isCollapsed={isCollapsed} collapsedHeight={COLLAPSED_HEIGHT}\n                class={className} style={style}\n\u003e\n    {categories.map((c) =\u003e\n        \u003cButtonLink\n            url={c.url}\n            badge={String(c.count)}\n            label={&#96;View all posts in the ${c.name.trim()} category&#96;}\n        \u003e\n            {c.name.trim()}\n        \u003c/ButtonLink\u003e\n    )}\n\u003c/WidgetLayout\u003e",

        "originalContents": "---\nimport type { CollectionEntry } from \"astro:content\";\nimport path from \"node:path\";\nimport { Icon } from \"astro-icon/components\";\nimport I18nKey from \"../i18n/i18nKey\";\nimport { i18n } from \"../i18n/translation\";\nimport { getDir } from \"../utils/url-utils\";\nimport ImageWrapper from \"./misc/ImageWrapper.astro\";\nimport PostMetadata from \"./PostMeta.astro\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\tclass?: string;\n\tentry: CollectionEntry\u003c\"posts\"\u003e;\n\ttitle: string;\n\turl: string;\n\tpublished: Date;\n\tupdated?: Date;\n\ttags: string[];\n\tcategory: string | null;\n\timage: string;\n\tdescription: string;\n\tdraft: boolean;\n\tstyle: string;\n}\nconst {\n\tentry,\n\ttitle,\n\turl,\n\tpublished,\n\tupdated,\n\ttags,\n\tcategory,\n\timage,\n\tdescription,\n\tstyle,\n} = Astro.props;\nconst className = Astro.props.class;\n\nconst hasCover = image !== undefined \u0026\u0026 image !== null \u0026\u0026 image !== \"\";\n\nconst coverWidth = \"28%\";\n\nconst { remarkPluginFrontmatter } = await entry.render();\n---\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {

          },
          "startPosition": {}

      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "import type { CollectionEntry } from \"astro:content\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import { getPostUrlBySlug } from \"@utils/url-utils\";"

            "lineNumber": 4,

          },

            "lineNumber": 5
          },

            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "const { page } = Astro.props;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "let delay = 0;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "const interval = 50;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"transition flex flex-col rounded-[var(--radius-large)] bg-[var(--card-bg)] py-1 md:py-0 md:bg-transparent md:gap-4 mb-4\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    {page.data.map((entry: CollectionEntry\u003c\"posts\"\u003e) =\u003e ("
          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 18,

            "lineNumber": 19,

        "originalContents": "---\nimport type { CollectionEntry } from \"astro:content\";\nimport { getPostUrlBySlug } from \"@utils/url-utils\";\nimport PostCard from \"./PostCard.astro\";\n\nconst { page } = Astro.props;\n\nlet delay = 0;\nconst interval = 50;\n---\n\u003cdiv class=\"transition flex flex-col rounded-[var(--radius-large)] bg-[var(--card-bg)] py-1 md:py-0 md:bg-transparent md:gap-4 mb-4\"\u003e\n    {page.data.map((entry: CollectionEntry\u003c\"posts\"\u003e) =\u003e (\n        \u003cPostCard\n                entry={entry}\n                title={entry.data.title}\n                tags={entry.data.tags}\n                category={entry.data.category}\n                published={entry.data.published}\n                updated={entry.data.updated}\n                url={getPostUrlBySlug(entry.slug)}\n                image={entry.data.image}\n                description={entry.data.description}\n                draft={entry.data.draft}\n                class:list=\"onload-animation\"\n                style={&#96;animation-delay: calc(var(--content-delay) + ${delay++ * interval}ms);&#96;}\n        \u003e\u003c/PostCard\u003e\n    ))}\n\u003c/div\u003e",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 6,
            "line": 27
          },
          "startPosition": {}

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "        \u003ca href={url}"

            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "           class=\"transition group w-full block font-bold mb-3 text-3xl text-90"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "        hover:text-[var(--primary)] dark:hover:text-[var(--primary)]"

          },
          {

          },

          },
          {

            "text": "        \"\u003e"
          },
          {

            "text": "            {title}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "            \u003cIcon class=\"inline text-[2rem] text-[var(--primary)] md:hidden translate-y-0.5 absolute\" name=\"material-symbols:chevron-right-rounded\" \u003e\u003c/Icon\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "            \u003cIcon class=\"text-[var(--primary)] text-[2rem] transition hidden md:inline absolute translate-y-0.5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 -translate-x-1 group-hover:translate-x-0\" name=\"material-symbols:chevron-right-rounded\"\u003e\u003c/Icon\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "        \u003c/a\u003e"
          },

            "lineNumber": 58
          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "        \u003cPostMetadata published={published} updated={updated} tags={tags} category={category} hideTagsForMobile={true} hideUpdateDate={true} class=\"mb-4\"\u003e\u003c/PostMetadata\u003e"
          },

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "            "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\u003cdiv class:list={[\"card-base flex flex-col-reverse md:flex-col w-full rounded-[var(--radius-large)] overflow-hidden relative\", className]} style={style}\u003e\n    \u003cdiv class:list={[\"pl-6 md:pl-9 pr-6 md:pr-2 pt-6 md:pt-7 pb-6 relative\", {\"w-full md:w-[calc(100%_-_52px_-_12px)]\": !hasCover, \"w-full md:w-[calc(100%_-_var(--coverWidth)_-_12px)]\": hasCover}]}\u003e\n        \u003ca href={url}\n           class=\"transition group w-full block font-bold mb-3 text-3xl text-90\n        hover:text-[var(--primary)] dark:hover:text-[var(--primary)]\n        active:text-[var(--title-active)] dark:active:text-[var(--title-active)]\n        before:w-1 before:h-5 before:rounded-md before:bg-[var(--primary)]\n        before:absolute before:top-[35px] before:left-[18px] before:hidden md:before:block\n        \"\u003e\n            {title}\n            \u003cIcon class=\"inline text-[2rem] text-[var(--primary)] md:hidden translate-y-0.5 absolute\" name=\"material-symbols:chevron-right-rounded\" \u003e\u003c/Icon\u003e\n            \u003cIcon class=\"text-[var(--primary)] text-[2rem] transition hidden md:inline absolute translate-y-0.5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 -translate-x-1 group-hover:translate-x-0\" name=\"material-symbols:chevron-right-rounded\"\u003e\u003c/Icon\u003e\n        \u003c/a\u003e\n\n        \u003c!-- metadata --\u003e\n        \u003cPostMetadata published={published} updated={updated} tags={tags} category={category} hideTagsForMobile={true} hideUpdateDate={true} class=\"mb-4\"\u003e\u003c/PostMetadata\u003e\n\n        \u003c!-- description --\u003e\n        \u003cdiv class:list={[\"transition text-75 mb-3.5 pr-4\", {\"line-clamp-2 md:line-clamp-1\": !description}]}\u003e\n            { description || remarkPluginFrontmatter.excerpt }\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n\n        \u003c!-- word count and read time  --\u003e\n",

        "originalContents": "import { defineCollection, z } from \"astro:content\";\n\nconst postsCollection = defineCollection({\n\tschema: z.object({\n\t\ttitle: z.string(),\n\t\tpublished: z.date(),\n\t\tupdated: z.date().optional(),\n\t\tdraft: z.boolean().optional().default(false),\n\t\tdescription: z.string().optional().default(\"\"),\n\t\timage: z.string().optional().default(\"\"),\n\t\ttags: z.array(z.string()).optional().default([]),\n\t\tcategory: z.string().optional().nullable().default(\"\"),\n\t\tlang: z.string().optional().default(\"\"),\n\n\t\t/* For internal use */\n\t\tprevTitle: z.string().default(\"\"),\n\t\tprevSlug: z.string().default(\"\"),\n\t\tnextTitle: z.string().default(\"\"),\n\t\tnextSlug: z.string().default(\"\"),\n\t}),\n});\nconst specCollection = defineCollection({\n\tschema: z.object({}),\n});\nexport const collections = {\n\tposts: postsCollection,\n\tspec: specCollection,\n};",

        "originalContents": "{\n  \"$schema\": \"https://frontmatter.codes/frontmatter.schema.json\",\n  \"frontMatter.framework.id\": \"astro\",\n  \"frontMatter.preview.host\": \"http://localhost:4321\",\n  \"frontMatter.content.publicFolder\": \"public\",\n  \"frontMatter.content.pageFolders\": [\n    {\n      \"title\": \"posts\",\n      \"path\": \"[[workspace]]/src/content/posts\"\n    }\n  ],\n  \"frontMatter.taxonomy.contentTypes\": [\n    {\n      \"name\": \"default\",\n      \"pageBundle\": true,\n      \"previewPath\": \"'blog'\",\n      \"filePrefix\": null,\n      \"clearEmpty\": true,\n      \"fields\": [\n        {\n          \"title\": \"title\",\n          \"name\": \"title\",\n          \"type\": \"string\",\n          \"single\": true\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"description\",\n          \"name\": \"description\",\n          \"type\": \"string\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"published\",\n          \"name\": \"published\",\n          \"type\": \"datetime\",\n          \"default\": \"{{now}}\",\n          \"isPublishDate\": true\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"preview\",\n          \"name\": \"image\",\n          \"type\": \"image\",\n          \"isPreviewImage\": true\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"tags\",\n          \"name\": \"tags\",\n          \"type\": \"list\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"category\",\n          \"name\": \"category\",\n          \"type\": \"string\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"draft\",\n          \"name\": \"draft\",\n          \"type\": \"boolean\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"language\",\n          \"name\": \"language\",\n          \"type\": \"string\"\n        }\n      ]\n    }\n  ]\n}\n",

        "originalContents": "---\nimport { Icon } from \"astro-icon/components\";\nimport I18nKey from \"../i18n/i18nKey\";\nimport { i18n } from \"../i18n/translation\";\nimport { formatDateToYYYYMMDD } from \"../utils/date-utils\";\nimport { getCategoryUrl, getTagUrl } from \"../utils/url-utils\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\tclass: string;\n\tpublished: Date;\n\tupdated?: Date;\n\ttags: string[];\n\tcategory: string | null;\n\thideTagsForMobile?: boolean;\n\thideUpdateDate?: boolean;\n}\nconst {\n\tpublished,\n\tupdated,\n\ttags,\n\tcategory,\n\thideTagsForMobile = false,\n\thideUpdateDate = false,\n} = Astro.props;\nconst className = Astro.props.class;\n---\n\n\u003cdiv class:list={[\"flex flex-wrap text-neutral-500 dark:text-neutral-400 items-center gap-4 gap-x-4 gap-y-2\", className]}\u003e\n    \u003c!-- publish date --\u003e\n    \u003cdiv class=\"flex items-center\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv class=\"meta-icon\"\n        \u003e\n            \u003cIcon name=\"material-symbols:calendar-today-outline-rounded\" class=\"text-xl\"\u003e\u003c/Icon\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"text-50 text-sm font-medium\"\u003e{formatDateToYYYYMMDD(published)}\u003c/span\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\n    \u003c!-- update date --\u003e\n    {!hideUpdateDate \u0026\u0026 updated \u0026\u0026 updated.getTime() !== published.getTime() \u0026\u0026 (\n        \u003cdiv class=\"flex items-center\"\u003e\n            \u003cdiv class=\"meta-icon\"\n            \u003e\n                \u003cIcon name=\"material-symbols:edit-calendar-outline-rounded\" class=\"text-xl\"\u003e\u003c/Icon\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"text-50 text-sm font-medium\"\u003e{formatDateToYYYYMMDD(updated)}\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n    )}\n\n    \u003c!-- categories --\u003e\n",

        "originalContents": "---\nimport path from \"node:path\";\nimport License from \"@components/misc/License.astro\";\nimport Markdown from \"@components/misc/Markdown.astro\";\nimport I18nKey from \"@i18n/i18nKey\";\nimport { i18n } from \"@i18n/translation\";\nimport MainGridLayout from \"@layouts/MainGridLayout.astro\";\nimport { getSortedPosts } from \"@utils/content-utils\";\nimport { getDir, getPostUrlBySlug } from \"@utils/url-utils\";\nimport { Icon } from \"astro-icon/components\";\nimport { licenseConfig } from \"src/config\";\nimport ImageWrapper from \"../../components/misc/ImageWrapper.astro\";\nimport PostMetadata from \"../../components/PostMeta.astro\";\nimport { profileConfig, siteConfig } from \"../../config\";\nimport { formatDateToYYYYMMDD } from \"../../utils/date-utils\";\n\nexport async function getStaticPaths() {\n\tconst blogEntries = await getSortedPosts();\n\treturn blogEntries.map((entry) =\u003e ({\n\t\tparams: { slug: entry.slug },\n\t\tprops: { entry },\n\t}));\n}\n\nconst { entry } = Astro.props;\nconst { Content, headings } = await entry.render();\n\nconst { remarkPluginFrontmatter } = await entry.render();\n\nconst jsonLd = {\n\t\"@context\": \"https://schema.org\",\n\t\"@type\": \"BlogPosting\",\n\theadline: entry.data.title,\n\tdescription: entry.data.description || entry.data.title,\n\tkeywords: entry.data.tags,\n\tauthor: {\n\t\t\"@type\": \"Person\",\n\t\tname: profileConfig.name,\n\t\turl: Astro.site,\n\t},\n\tdatePublished: formatDateToYYYYMMDD(entry.data.published),\n\tinLanguage: entry.data.lang\n\t\t? entry.data.lang.replace(\"_\", \"-\")\n\t\t: siteConfig.lang.replace(\"_\", \"-\"),\n\t// TODO include cover image here\n};\n---\n",

      "codeBlock": {

            "text": "---"

          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "import type { GetStaticPaths } from \"astro\";"
          },

          },

          },

            "text": "import { getSortedPosts } from \"../utils/content-utils\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "export const getStaticPaths = (async ({ paginate }) =\u003e {"
          },

            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "\tconst allBlogPosts = await getSortedPosts();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "\treturn paginate(allBlogPosts, { pageSize: PAGE_SIZE });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "}) satisfies GetStaticPaths;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "// https://github.com/withastro/astro/issues/6507#issuecomment-1489916992"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "const { page } = Astro.props;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "const len = page.data.length;"
          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\u003cMainGridLayout\u003e"
          },

            "text": "    \u003cPostPage page={page}\u003e\u003c/PostPage\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    \u003cPagination class=\"mx-auto onload-animation\" page={page} style={&#96;animation-delay: calc(var(--content-delay) + ${(len)*50}ms)&#96;}\u003e\u003c/Pagination\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,

        "originalContents": "---\nimport type { GetStaticPaths } from \"astro\";\nimport Pagination from \"../components/control/Pagination.astro\";\nimport PostPage from \"../components/PostPage.astro\";\nimport { PAGE_SIZE } from \"../constants/constants\";\nimport MainGridLayout from \"../layouts/MainGridLayout.astro\";\nimport { getSortedPosts } from \"../utils/content-utils\";\n\nexport const getStaticPaths = (async ({ paginate }) =\u003e {\n\tconst allBlogPosts = await getSortedPosts();\n\treturn paginate(allBlogPosts, { pageSize: PAGE_SIZE });\n}) satisfies GetStaticPaths;\n// https://github.com/withastro/astro/issues/6507#issuecomment-1489916992\n\nconst { page } = Astro.props;\n\nconst len = page.data.length;\n---\n\n\u003cMainGridLayout\u003e\n    \u003cPostPage page={page}\u003e\u003c/PostPage\u003e\n    \u003cPagination class=\"mx-auto onload-animation\" page={page} style={&#96;animation-delay: calc(var(--content-delay) + ${(len)*50}ms)&#96;}\u003e\u003c/Pagination\u003e\n\u003c/MainGridLayout\u003e",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {

            "text": "import type { AstroIntegration } from \"@swup/astro\";"

          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\t\t\t}) =\u003e void;"

          {

            "text": "\t\t\trun: (config?: {"

            "text": "\t\t\t\tquerySelector?: string;"

        "originalContents": "import type { AstroIntegration } from \"@swup/astro\";\n\ndeclare global {\n\tinterface Window {\n\t\t// type from '@swup/astro' is incorrect\n\t\tswup: AstroIntegration;\n\t\tpagefind: {\n\t\t\tsearch: (query: string) =\u003e Promise\u003c{\n\t\t\t\tresults: Array\u003c{\n\t\t\t\t\tdata: () =\u003e Promise\u003cSearchResult\u003e;\n\t\t\t\t}\u003e;\n\t\t\t}\u003e;\n\t\t};\n\t\tmermaid?: {\n\t\t\tinitialize: (config: {\n\t\t\t\tstartOnLoad?: boolean;\n\t\t\t\ttheme?: string;\n\t\t\t\tsecurityLevel?: string;\n\t\t\t}) =\u003e void;\n\t\t\trun: (config?: {\n\t\t\t\tquerySelector?: string;\n\t\t\t}) =\u003e void;\n\t\t};\n\t}\n}\n\ninterface SearchResult {\n\turl: string;\n\tmeta: {\n\t\ttitle: string;\n\t};\n\texcerpt: string;\n\tcontent?: string;\n\tword_count?: number;\n\tfilters?: Record\u003cstring, unknown\u003e;\n\tanchors?: Array\u003c{\n\t\telement: string;\n\t\tid: string;\n\t\ttext: string;\n\t\tlocation: number;\n\t}\u003e;\n\tweighted_locations?: Array\u003c{\n\t\tweight: number;\n\t\tbalanced_score: number;\n\t\tlocation: number;\n\t}\u003e;\n\tlocations?: number[];\n\traw_content?: string;\n\traw_url?: string;\n\tsub_results?: SearchResult[];\n}",

        "originalContents": "\u003cscript lang=\"ts\"\u003e\nimport { onMount } from \"svelte\";\n\nimport I18nKey from \"../i18n/i18nKey\";\nimport { i18n } from \"../i18n/translation\";\nimport { getPostUrlBySlug } from \"../utils/url-utils\";\n\nexport let tags: string[];\nexport let categories: string[];\nexport let sortedPosts: Post[] = [];\n\nconst params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\ntags = params.has(\"tag\") ? params.getAll(\"tag\") : [];\ncategories = params.has(\"category\") ? params.getAll(\"category\") : [];\nconst uncategorized = params.get(\"uncategorized\");\n\ninterface Post {\n\tslug: string;\n\tdata: {\n\t\ttitle: string;\n\t\ttags: string[];\n\t\tcategory?: string;\n\t\tpublished: Date;\n\t};\n}\n\ninterface Group {\n\tyear: number;\n\tposts: Post[];\n}\n\nlet groups: Group[] = [];\n\nfunction formatDate(date: Date) {\n\tconst month = (date.getMonth() + 1).toString().padStart(2, \"0\");\n\tconst day = date.getDate().toString().padStart(2, \"0\");\n\treturn &#96;${month}-${day}&#96;;\n}\n\nfunction formatTag(tagList: string[]) {\n\treturn tagList.map((t) =\u003e &#96;#${t}&#96;).join(\" \");\n}\n\nonMount(async () =\u003e {\n\tlet filteredPosts: Post[] = sortedPosts;\n\n\tif (tags.length \u003e 0) {\n\t\tfilteredPosts = filteredPosts.filter(\n\t\t\t(post) =\u003e\n\t\t\t\tArray.isArray(post.data.tags) \u0026\u0026\n\t\t\t\tpost.data.tags.some((tag) =\u003e tags.includes(tag)),\n\t\t);\n\t}\n\n\tif (categories.length \u003e 0) {\n\t\tfilteredPosts = filteredPosts.filter(\n\t\t\t(post) =\u003e post.data.category \u0026\u0026 categories.includes(post.data.category),\n\t\t);\n\t}\n\n\tif (uncategorized) {\n\t\tfilteredPosts = filteredPosts.filter((post) =\u003e !post.data.category);\n\t}\n\n\tconst grouped = filteredPosts.reduce(\n\t\t(acc, post) =\u003e {\n\t\t\tconst year = post.data.published.getFullYear();\n\t\t\tif (!acc[year]) {\n\t\t\t\tacc[year] = [];\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tacc[year].push(post);\n\t\t\treturn acc;\n\t\t},\n\t\t{} as Record\u003cnumber, Post[]\u003e,\n\t);\n\n\tconst groupedPostsArray = Object.keys(grouped).map((yearStr) =\u003e ({\n\t\tyear: Number.parseInt(yearStr, 10),\n\t\tposts: grouped[Number.parseInt(yearStr, 10)],\n\t}));\n\n\tgroupedPostsArray.sort((a, b) =\u003e b.year - a.year);\n\n\tgroups = groupedPostsArray;\n});\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n",

リンターエラーを解消しました。

修正内容：

1. **`ArchivePanel.svelte` の `Post` インターフェースの `category` フィールドを修正**
   - `category?: string` を `category?: string | null` に変更
   - `PostForList` の `category: string | null | undefined` と互換性を確保

2. **`tags` と `categories` プロパティにデフォルト値を設定**
   - `export let tags: string[];` を `export let tags: string[] = [];` に変更
   - `export let categories: string[];` を `export let categories: string[] = [];` に変更
   - `archive.astro` からこれらのプロパティを渡さなくても動作するように

これで型エラーは解消されました。
